r030_phase: Phase 2 (原第29輪 in topic table, mapped to Phase 2 under current round mapping)
implementation_summary: R030 Decision PreChecklist candidate: deterministic pre-order gate that enforces all R030 constraints before any buy/sell/order enters the execution chain. Integrates Market Reality Layer checks, NEA (Net Expected Advantage) engine, deterministic Risk Gate / Final Gate with veto, position sizing against 6 independent limits, confidence calibration guard (raw confidence never directly sizes positions), Taiwan market constraints (price limits, T+2, sessions, odd lots, liquidity, suspension, disposition stocks), single-signal no-direct-trade rule, event/news/social no-direct-trade rule, LLM-not-trade-core enforcement, and full replay trace with decision chain.

checklist_item_coverage.market_reality_layer: Checklist evaluates cost, slippage, fill probability, liquidity, price validity. Market reality fail blocks trade with MARKET_REALITY_FAIL veto.
checklist_item_coverage.nea_net_expected_advantage: NEAEngine calculates net_edge = gross_return - costs - slippage - risk_premium. Passes only if net_edge >= min, expected_net_rr >= min, fill_probability >= min, regime_uncertainty <= max. NEA_FAIL veto with reason codes.
checklist_item_coverage.deterministic_risk_gate: Risk Gate / Final Gate implemented via extra_veto_hook. Any veto blocks trade. Veto requires reason_code. All vetoes recorded in decision trace.
checklist_item_coverage.deterministic_position_sizing: PositionSizingEngine calculates max_qty = min(risk_budget, liquidity, portfolio_exposure, strategy_cap, regime_cap, cash_available). Raw confidence cannot directly size positions. Calibrated confidence only used as secondary modifier.
checklist_item_coverage.confidence_calibration: ConfidenceCalibrationGuard: raw_confidence <= 0.5 blocked. Historical Brier score > 0.3 halves calibration factor. Fewer than 5 past decisions applies 0.8x multiplier. Regime uncertainty reduces calibration factor. Raw confidence never directly used for sizing.
checklist_item_coverage.replay_compatibility: ReplayTrace: trace_id, symbol, side, candidate_action, timestamp, decision_chain (all steps with results), risk_snapshot, market_reality_snapshot, threshold_config_version, final_decision, vetoes, order/fill/pnl refs. Supports replay and audit.
checklist_item_coverage.order_fill_pnl_schema: ReplayTrace includes order_ref, fill_ref, pnl_ref fields for downstream linkage.
checklist_item_coverage.taiwan_market_constraints: Checks: suspended (is_suspended), disposition stock (is_disposition_stock), near ±10% limit (is_near_limit_up/is_near_limit_down), liquidity insufficient (liquidity_score < 0.3), collection auction session (is_collection_auction). Each constraint can veto. Odd lot (is_odd_lot) flagged but not automatically blocked.
checklist_item_coverage.single_signal_no_direct_trade: Single signal sources (technical_indicator, ai_score, single_strategy) blocked with SINGLE_SIGNAL_DIRECT_TRADE veto. Event/news/social sources get HIGH_IMPACT_UNCONFIRMED_EVENT veto.
checklist_item_coverage.llm_not_trade_core: Signal sources containing 'llm' or 'api' blocked with LLM_IS_TRADE_CORE veto. LLM can assist research/summary but not release trades.
checklist_item_coverage.event_news_social_no_direct_trade: news_headline, social_sentiment, breaking_event, unconfirmed_rumor, event_driven: blocked with HIGH_IMPACT_UNCONFIRMED_EVENT veto. Only watch/no-trade/reduce-size/wait-confirmation/tighten-risk allowed.
checklist_item_coverage.risk_veto_can_block_any_trade: All vetoes block the trade. extra_veto_hook allows any external Risk Gate to inject additional veto. Veto requires reason_code. All vetoes recorded in trace.

prohibited_runtime_proof.r030_dispatch_started: TRUE (this is the controlled candidate dispatch — not runtime loop)
